codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers the feature requirements. Created multi_signal module in swell-validation with ValidationSignal struct (6 signal types: test, lint, types, static_analysis, llm_review, spec_conformance), SignalWeights with configurable weights, MultiSignalValidator for aggregating signals and computing weighted scores, MultiSignalOutcome with overall validation result, and comprehensive test suite with 22 unit tests + 1 doctest.

issues.description: Verification step uses incorrect crate: 'cargo test -p swell-tools -- multi_signal' but feature was implemented in swell-validation. Actual tests were run correctly as 'cargo test -p swell-validation -- multi_signal' which passed. This is a documentation discrepancy only.

sharedStateObservations.observation: No convention gaps detected. Worker followed standard Rust patterns, used async_trait where appropriate, proper error handling, and comprehensive test coverage.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: All 22 unit tests + 1 doctest pass, clippy shows no warnings, workspace builds successfully.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed Rust skill guidance appropriately. The skill's focus on ownership, borrowing, and error handling was correctly applied in the implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: No ownership issues in implementation. Uses Result-style patterns where appropriate. Float comparisons (0.30, 0.20, etc.) are explicit literals not computed values, so direct equality is safe in this context.

sharedStateObservations.observation: No new services or commands were used that should be added to services.yaml. Worker only used standard cargo commands already documented in AGENTS.md.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Commands run: cargo build --workspace, cargo test -p swell-validation -- multi_signal, cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker discovered existing validation module structure and appropriately added multi_signal as a new module in swell-validation rather than swell-tools. This aligns with architecture.md which lists validation gates (LintGate, TestGate) under swell-validation crate.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Implementation is in crates/swell-validation/src/multi_signal.rs and re-exported from lib.rs. Architecture.md documents swell-validation as the location for quality gates.

summary: Feature implementation is complete and correct. All 6 signal types (test, lint, types, static_analysis, llm_review, spec_conformance) are properly implemented with configurable weights and aggregation logic. 22 unit tests + 1 doctest pass successfully. The only minor issue is a documentation discrepancy in features.json's verificationSteps (references wrong crate for testing), but actual testing was performed correctly.
